response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with strong TypeScript/Node.js expertise, React experience at Optilyz, and directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators) at re:cinq. He demonstrates software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and has worked across the full stack with MongoDB, Docker, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK). Gaps in explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin experience are notable but his polyglot background (TypeScript, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent) suggests rapid adaptability.
strengths: Direct AI-agent / MCP development experience at re:cinq matches a key requirement
Deep TypeScript/Node.js + React stack experience with MongoDB and AWS at Optilyz
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the primary stack
Vitest and Kotlin not mentioned; testing experience appears more Jest/Selenium-oriented
Significant DLang focus across career may indicate less recent depth in the exact target stack
